历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 2464 → 2109 → 2036 → 2877 → 4295. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 2000 and 2500 from 2021 to 2023, then sharply dropped to 2877 in 2024, and further significantly shifted backward to 4295 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2260 positions over the past two years, showing a clear downward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4295. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province was 282 in 2021, 263 in 2022, 266 in 2023, 269 in 2024, and 266 in 2025, remaining basically stable in the 260–280 range. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is significantly reduced to 219 (with an additional 14 for Medical Category listed separately), a decrease of about 47 from 2025, a reduction of approximately 17.7%, leading to significantly intensified competition and a forward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 9th from 2021 to 2024 and rose to 8th in 2025–2026, firmly in the national Top 10, with a stable and slightly improving ranking in recent years, continuously enhancing its appeal to candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents related to campus safety, teacher ethics, and school management, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its overall Douyin popularity ranks 19th (high heat), with large short video exposure and high attention. In terms of historical admission anomalies, a high-attention signal appeared in 2023, but no significant gaps have been recorded in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Marxist Theory A+, Law A+, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A+, Geophysics A+, Water Resources Engineering A, Biology A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Business Administration A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended, closely aligning with Wuhan University's advantageous disciplines. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Jiangxi Province is approximately 474,900, slightly higher than in 2025, with an estimated 267,800 in the Physics Category, expanding the competition base. Wuhan University is located in Hubei Province, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, which is favorable for regional preference. The university has a large enrollment scale in Jiangxi Province (Physics Category consistently above 260 people annually), making it a major out-of-province university in Jiangxi, with high local recognition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4295, the significant reduction in the 2026 Physics Category plan by about 17.7%, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, the university's Soft Science ranking rising to 8th, and the somewhat negative reputation, the intensified competition due to enrollment reduction is the most critical factor driving a forward shift in rankings, but the expansion of the candidate base and reputation public opinion have some offsetting effects. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the 2026 Physics Category will be approximately 3870, with a range of 3483–4257.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选首批双一流建设高校，综合实力稳居全国前列。其医学学科依托综合性大学优势，临床医学 、口腔医学等专业享有极高声誉，在华中地区乃至全国具有强劲竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续攀升，临床医学、口腔医学尤其受到高分考生青睐。武汉大学地处华中中心城市武汉，区位优势明显，医疗资源丰富。江西省医学类招生规模较 小，2026年仅14个计划且全部为顶尖医学专业，竞争将异常激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与专业结构变化分析，预测2026年武汉大学医学类在江西省最低录取位次约为8430名，较2025年大幅提升（位次数字减小），波动区间预计在7930至8930之间 。建议考生结合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking for Wuhan University's medical category in Jiangxi Province was 2464 in 2021 (total plan 35), dropped significantly to 12236 in 2022 (plan 34), 12879 in 2023 (plan 33), 13944 in 2024 (plan 32), and 15220 in 2025 (plan 45). Rankings continued to decline from 2022 to 2025, mainly due to low-score majors such as Nursing and Public Health and Preventive Medicine lowering the overall threshold. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan sharply decreased from 45 to 14, a reduction of 68.9%, and only high-score majors such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated), Clinical Medicine (Excellent Physician Class), and Stomatology are retained, with no further enrollment in low-score majors like Nursing, Public Health, or Pharmacy, resulting in a fundamental optimization of the major structure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as one of the first batch of Double First-Class construction universities, with comprehensive strength consistently ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines, leveraging the advantages of a comprehensive university, enjoy a high reputation in Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and other specialties, with strong competitiveness in Central China and nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of medical majors has been rising in recent years, with Clinical Medicine and Stomatology particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, a central city in Central China, with obvious geographical advantages and abundant medical resources. The enrollment scale for medical majors in Jiangxi Province is small, with only 14 plans in 2026, all for top-tier medical specialties, making competition extremely fierce.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the analysis of the supply-demand elasticity model and changes in major structure, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University's medical category in Jiangxi Province in 2026 will be approximately 8430, a significant improvement compared to 2025 (smaller ranking number), with a fluctuation range expected between 7930 and 8930. Candidates are advised to position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.

For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to target Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) as the main direction, Stomatology (Five-Year) as a stable choice, and Stomatology (5+3 Integrated) and Excellent Physician Class as reach goals.
